title: Constraint3DOF
description: Constraint3DOF: Constraint objects with three translational degrees of freedom, used for support of 2D analytical objects.

Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

KX.description: Defines the stiffness in X-direction. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

KY.description: Defines the stiffness in Y-direction. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

KNorm.description: Defines the stiffness in Z- or Normal-direction. This will only be active when corresponding degree of freedom has a DOFType with a stiffness dependency, such as Spring. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
